rationale: Educ. Code §33.093 governs school district lettering for Special Olympics participation. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: If a school district allows high school students to earn a letter for academic, athletic, or extracurricular achievements, the district must allow high school students in the district to earn a letter on the basis of a student's participation in a Special Olympics event.
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption change and this statute.
